forbidden_mutations: Wall-clock fields in deterministic verdict path.

notes: Primary runtime traces remain append-only in the independently owned service repository.
API sync payloads are emitted only after local validation succeeds.
Trace packets and receipts stay hash-referenced.

validator_checks: every record satisfies trace schema requirements
journal.index.json matches actual trace head and count
validator.receipt.json matches the current validated state

requirements: Only validated governance artifacts may be sent.
Payloads must remain trace-linked and hash-verifiable.
A sync receipt artifact is required before the sync is considered complete.
Handbook acknowledgement packets must exist before intake packets are valid.
Service intake packets must remain ordered and reference the intake workflow stages.
Protocol chain packets must reference upstream and downstream stages.
Shell execution receipts must include the actor, allowed scope, approval refs, and result hash.
Collaboration ideation packets must include the human and agent role context, problem framing, option comparison, and chosen rationale.
Revenue signal packets must include commercialization evidence linked to the service value unit.
Deployment topology packets must include frontend platform, backend platform, domain owner, api boundary, domain routing mode, and rollback entrypoint references.

reflection_gate.release_rule: production release must fail when any high severity reflection action is overdue or unresolved

revenue_signal_rules.minimum_rule: launch readiness must fail when the service value unit or buyer problem statement is undefined
